context: You can already describe your routine and your home. The next real-life step is the city around you: saying where places are so you can answer and ask simple location questions.
explanation: Start with three high-use place words: calle, parque and tienda. With just these and words you already know (hay, esta), you can already say useful things: hay un parque, estoy en la calle, hay una tienda cerca.

examples.note: hay + place is the fastest way to locate something.

examples.es: el gimnasio esta al lado del parque
examples.en: the gym is next to the park
examples.note: al lado de is a reusable location chunk.

examples.es: la tienda esta enfrente del restaurante
examples.en: the shop is in front of the restaurant
examples.note: enfrente de helps you compare two places directly.

examples.es: el parque esta detras del supermercado
examples.en: the park is behind the supermarket

examples.es: el supermercado esta fuera del centro
examples.en: the supermarket is outside the center
examples.note: dentro de / fuera de gives inside vs outside contrast.
